toolchains.name: windows-native
toolchains.purpose: Native Windows execution when mlir-opt.exe is installed and on PATH.

toolchains.name: ssh-mlir15-optional
toolchains.purpose: Optional remote execution path for older MLIR environments. Disabled unless MLIRSHIELD_USE_SSH=1 is configured.

toolchains.name: ssh-mlir22-evidence
toolchains.purpose: Historical LLVM/MLIR 22 toolchain used to generate Discovery MLIR22 and MIN-004 crash evidence.

toolchains.name: ssh-mlir23-optional
toolchains.purpose: Optional LLVM/MLIR development snapshot runner for current validation.
